title: About EIM Research Lab
description: Getting closer to the Enterprise Infrastructure Management research laboratory at Telkom University.
overviewContent1: EIM (Enterprise Infrastructure Management) is a research laboratory under the S1 Information Systems Study Program, Enterprise and Industrial System Expertise Group, Faculty of Industrial Engineering, Telkom University.
overviewContent2: We focus on understanding and developing digital infrastructure such as computer networks, operating systems, cloud computing, and cybersecurity. We conduct research, in-depth studies, and large-scale technology training to prepare future digital talents.
vision: To establish the Enterprise Infrastructure Management (EIM) Research Laboratory as a hub for optimal assistant potential development, creating a leading, collaborative, and competitive research laboratory capable of producing innovative and professional human resources ready to contribute academically and industrially.
missions: Strengthening faith and devotion as a moral foundation in every activity of the EIM Research Laboratory.
Fostering smart, professional, and responsible assistants in academics, research, and community service.
Creating a conducive and productive laboratory environment by upholding EIM Work values.
Developing sustainable work programs through innovation and quality improvement.
Strengthening communication and collaboration with all stakeholders.
